briefdescription.para: Utility function to generate new window recreation macro of DataBrowser (also used for SweepBrowser) after GUI editor adapted controls in development process.

detaileddescription.para:
Only outside callers are generic external panels which must update the graph.
win
locked databrowser
The databrowser only knows about one experiment/device at a time so we don't need to specify what we return further.

briefdescription.para: procedure for the open button of the side panel
Adds traces of a sweep to the databrowser graph.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default = n/a] BufferedDrawInfo structure, when given buffered draw is used.

briefdescription.para: Find a Databrowser which is locked to the given DAEphys panel.
DB Panel for browsing acquired data during acquisition
